name: Updated Mincemeat
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Combine all ingredients and grind twice through the finest blade of your meat grinder.
3. Place mixture in a lidded, oven-proof pot and place in the oven.
4. Bake for 40 minutes.
5. Remove from oven and stir in brandy.
6. Store mincemeat in a cool place for at least 1 week before using, or up to 6 months.
